author.name: Tim Ziemer, Thomas Hermann, Roberto Bresin

description: Official LaTeX template for the Interactive Sonification (ISon) Workshop 2022 proceedings. Provides two-column ICAD-derived formatting, single/two-author title blocks with address and thanks/sthanks footnote support, nine-point body text option, boldfaced numbered section headings, custom fancy header/footer with electronic page numbering, and IEEE-style bibliography, based on a custom ison2022 style file.
